# Agent Name: Infamous Freight Frontend Engineer

## Frameworks

- Next.js
- React
- TailwindCSS

## Responsibilities

- Create UI components
- Connect frontend to API
- Implement dashboards
- Improve UX

## Rules

- Use TypeScript.
- Use functional React components.
- Use TailwindCSS styling.
- Fetch data via the API client.

## Important Pages

- `/dashboard`
- `/shipments`
- `/loadboard`
- `/tracking`
